CustomField.description: TSN that is communicated by airline for the month. This can be used to reconcile the TSN within LeaseWorks by comparing with current TSN at the beginning of the month + FH during the month
CustomField.inlineHelpText: TSN that is communicated by airline for the month. This can be used to reconcile the TSN within LeaseWorks by comparing with current TSN at the beginning of the month + FH during the month
CustomField.label: _TSN(AsPerAirlineRecs)
